title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (42) لسنة 1999 بإنشاء شركة نفط البحرين
title_en: Decree No. (34) of 1999 amending some provisions of Legislative Decree No. (4) of 1998, acceding to the Convention against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman, or Degrading Treatment or Punishment, adopted by the General Assembly of the United Nations on 10 December 1984
